abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

abilities.name: Propaganda Piece
abilities.text: After this model suffers damage from an enemy model, increase this crew's scandal bar by 1. While this crew's scandal bar is half full or more, this model receives a (+) while resisting.

actions.name: Modified Pick Axe
actions.costs_and_restrictions: The target ignores any (fortitude) to resist this action.

triggers.name: Terminate Contract
triggers.text: After killing, increase this crew's scandal bar by 3.

triggers.name: Public Backlash
triggers.text: Decrease this crew's scandal bar by 1. Deal this action's Dmg -1 to a different model within 3" of the target.

triggers.name: Blank Stare
triggers.text: Discard a card. Target gains a Slow token and must discard a card.

actions.name: Move or Be Moved
actions.effects: Target moves its Sp +2" toward this model.

triggers.name: Proof of Their Crimes
triggers.text: Decrease this crew's scandal bar by 3. An ally within 6" gains a Fast token.

actions.name: Heroic Intervention
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Enemy engaged with another friendly model only.
actions.effects: Move all friendly models engaged with the target 5" away from the target. Then, place this model in base contact with the target. This model may declare (melee) targeting the target.

triggers.name: The People's Protector
triggers.text: Increase this crew's scandal bar by 2. This model heals 3.
